posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using gmail, and when we start creating an email :

  • 1/ add an email adress, add a title, and add the body of the email (see image Bug-email1),
  • 2/ then change the tab (and go in updates for exemples),
  • 3/ Go back to email tab ==> the email address and title inserted in 1/ has disapeared , Only the body of the email is still appearing.
    How can we avoid this?
